title: 🚀 Locking It In:
content:
🚀 Locking It In:

We now have a clear, flexible structure with:
✔ Pathways that are balanced and rewarding.
✔ No unnecessary assignments or busy work.
✔ A grading system that maintains fairness & rigor.
✔ A streamlined approach that prevents burnout—for you & your students.

Next Steps:

Would you like a formal syllabus draft to reflect these changes? Or should we first draft a student announcement explaining the system in an engaging way?

Macro Schedule Finalization: Pathways, Peer Review, Research, and Weekly Structure


🔑 1. Peer Review as a Mandatory “Key”
• Everyone must complete two peer reviews on final research essays (even if they are opting out of writing the full paper themselves).
• Without completing the peer review, students cannot submit their final work.
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 78 (chunk 78/108)
